_comment: SEED DATA ONLY. Nothing at runtime reads this file except the one-time seed migration in src/index.ts (ensureSeeded), which imports these subjects + preambles into KV on first boot when `subject-index` is absent. After seeding, subjects live in KV (subject:<id> + subject-index) and are edited via the UI / /api/subjects. Editing this file has no effect on an already-seeded deployment. The per-subject `source` field is legacy (dropped on import); `sprite` becomes the subject's first refImage.

settings.preamble: A clean catalog-style illustration of %SUBJECT% (%KIND%), rendered as a single isolated specimen on an asset sheet. The subject is shown in strict broadside profile, viewed perfectly from the side with its long axis running horizontally across the frame; %FACING%. It floats centered against a uniform flat magenta backdrop (#FF00FF) that fills the entire frame in every direction, with no ground, no floor, no surface beneath it, no other objects, and no cast shadow on the background. The whole subject is centered and fills about three quarters of the square frame, with a small even margin around it and nothing else in the scene. Lighting is soft and even with gentle ambient fill landing only on the subject, no rim light or glow bleeding onto the magenta. Painted 2D illustration style with hard edges and a readable silhouette at small size. The camera is a flat side elevation, never isometric, never three-quarter, never top-down. Do NOT include any spaceship, vehicle, gun, or weapon hardware unless %SUBJECT% literally is one — render exactly what %SUBJECT% describes and nothing else.

kind_preambles.player: A pure orthographic side-elevation reference drawing of %SUBJECT% — the player's small starship — drawn flat for a 2D side-scrolling game sprite sheet. THE CAMERA IS EXACTLY PERPENDICULAR TO THE SHIP'S LONG AXIS. This is NOT a three-quarter view, NOT an isometric view, NOT an angled or perspective shot, NOT a product render — it is a strict left/right side elevation, the kind of view where the ship has a left side and a right side and you see exactly one of them, like a technical blueprint or a Metroid / Gradius sprite. %FACING%. The ship floats centered against a uniform flat magenta backdrop (#FF00FF) that fills the entire frame, with no ground, no surface, no other objects, no cast shadow, no atmospheric perspective. The ship fills about three quarters of the square frame. Lighting is soft and even with gentle ambient fill landing only on the ship, no rim light or glow bleeding onto the magenta backdrop. Painted 2D illustration style with hard edges and a readable silhouette at small size. Microscopic-medical-sci-fi aesthetic — fluorescence-microscopy palette of bone-white plating, crimson plasma vents, cyan running lights. Render exactly the starship %SUBJECT% describes and absolutely nothing else — no environment, no other ships, no enemies, no projectiles, no UI.
kind_preambles.enemy: A pure orthographic side-elevation reference drawing of %SUBJECT% — an enemy creature — drawn flat for a 2D side-scrolling game sprite sheet. THE CAMERA IS EXACTLY PERPENDICULAR TO THE CREATURE'S LONG AXIS. This is NOT a three-quarter view, NOT an isometric view, NOT an angled or perspective shot, NOT a museum diorama photograph — it is a strict left/right side elevation, like a Metroid / Gradius / Konami arcade sprite or a biology textbook side-profile illustration where the creature has a left side and a right side and you see exactly one of them. %FACING%. The creature floats centered against a uniform flat magenta backdrop (#FF00FF) that fills the entire frame, with no ground, no surface, no other objects, no cast shadow. The creature fills about three quarters of the square frame. Lighting is soft and even with gentle ambient fill landing only on the creature, no rim light or glow bleeding onto the magenta. Painted 2D illustration style with hard edges and a readable silhouette at small size. Microscopic-medical-sci-fi aesthetic — fluorescence-microscopy palette of bone-yellow chitin, crimson plasma, cyan glow, ochre minerals. Render exactly the creature %SUBJECT% describes and absolutely nothing else — no player ship, no environment, no projectiles, no hardware unless the creature literally has it.
kind_preambles.weapon: A pure orthographic side-elevation reference drawing of %SUBJECT% — a single in-flight ammunition projectile by itself — drawn flat for a 2D side-scrolling game sprite sheet. THE CAMERA IS EXACTLY PERPENDICULAR TO THE PROJECTILE'S TRAVEL AXIS. This is NOT a three-quarter view, NOT an isometric view, NOT an angled or perspective shot — it is a strict side elevation, like a Gradius / Touhou / shmup bullet sprite. %FACING%. The projectile is rendered at very small scale, occupying only the central 25-35% of the frame, with a generous amount of empty magenta space surrounding it. It floats centered against a uniform flat magenta backdrop (#FF00FF) that fills the entire frame, with no ground, no surface, no other objects, no cast shadow. There is absolutely NO gun, NO weapon hardware, NO mechanism, NO launcher, NO vehicle, NO character, NO hand — only the lone projectile particle itself in flight. The shape reads clearly at small size with a tight readable silhouette. Lighting is soft and even with gentle ambient fill landing only on the projectile, no rim light or glow bleeding onto the magenta. Painted 2D illustration style with hard edges. Render exactly the projectile %SUBJECT% describes and absolutely nothing else.
kind_preambles.option: A pure orthographic side-elevation reference drawing of %SUBJECT% — a tiny autonomous medical-nanotech helper drone that flies alongside the player's ship — drawn flat for a 2D side-scrolling game sprite sheet. THE CAMERA IS EXACTLY PERPENDICULAR TO THE DRONE'S LONG AXIS. This is NOT a three-quarter view, NOT an isometric view, NOT an angled or perspective shot, NOT a product render — it is a strict left/right side elevation, like a Gradius option sprite or a Treasure / Konami arcade drone. The drone has a left side and a right side, and you see EXACTLY ONE of them, flat against the picture plane. %FACING%. The drone is small and compact, distinctly smaller than the player's starship would be at the same scale. It floats centered against a uniform flat magenta backdrop (#FF00FF) that fills the entire frame, with no ground, no surface, no other objects, no cast shadow, no atmospheric perspective. The drone fills about three quarters of the square frame. Lighting is soft and even with gentle ambient fill landing only on the drone, no rim light or glow bleeding onto the magenta. Painted 2D illustration style with hard edges and a readable silhouette at small size. Microscopic-medical-sci-fi aesthetic — fluorescence-microscopy palette of bone-white plating, crimson plasma vents, cyan glow. Render exactly the drone %SUBJECT% describes and absolutely nothing else — no player ship, no enemies, no projectiles, no environment.
kind_preambles.secondary_weapon: A pure orthographic side-elevation reference drawing of %SUBJECT% — a deployable explosive ordnance device — drawn flat for a 2D side-scrolling game sprite sheet. THE CAMERA IS EXACTLY PERPENDICULAR TO THE DEVICE'S LONG AXIS. This is NOT a three-quarter view, NOT an isometric view, NOT an angled or perspective shot, NOT a product photograph — it is a strict left/right side elevation, like a shmup bomb sprite or a technical blueprint. %FACING%. The device floats centered against a uniform flat magenta backdrop (#FF00FF) that fills the entire frame, with no ground, no surface, no other objects, no cast shadow. The device fills about three quarters of the square frame. Lighting is soft and even with gentle ambient fill landing only on the device, no rim light or glow bleeding onto the magenta. Painted 2D illustration style with hard edges and a readable silhouette at small size. Microscopic-medical-sci-fi aesthetic — fluorescence-microscopy palette of bone-white casing, crimson warning bands, cyan plasma fuse. Render exactly the device %SUBJECT% describes and absolutely nothing else — no player ship, no character holding it, no hand, no environment.
kind_preambles.augment: A flat, monochromatic, vector-style graphic-design icon representing %SUBJECT%. This is a tiny inventory icon for a roguelike shmup — NOT a painted illustration, NOT a 3D render, NOT a high-resolution scene, NOT a photograph. Render the icon as a single bold geometric symbol made of clean simple shapes, centered against a uniform flat magenta backdrop (#FF00FF) that fills the entire frame. The icon uses a strict two-tone palette: a single bright accent color (cyan #44d7ff or crimson #ff5c7a or bone-white) drawn directly on the magenta backdrop. No gradients, no painted shading, no soft brushwork, no rim lighting, no ambient fill, no environment, no characters, no perspective — just flat shapes and hard edges. The composition reads instantly at 32x32 pixels: one or two dominant geometric forms, generous negative space, strong silhouette, symbolic rather than literal. Think classic mobile-game upgrade badge, ASCII-game icon, vector pictogram, or skill-tree node icon. The icon visually communicates the gameplay effect described — pick the most reductive symbol that *means* the upgrade, not literal hardware. Centered straight-on view, never isometric, never angled, never three-quarter. %FACING%

kinds.weapon: a single in-flight ammunition projectile by itself, NOT a gun and NOT a vehicle, just the lone projectile particle mid-flight
kinds.option: a tiny autonomous medical-nanotech helper drone that flies alongside the player
kinds.augment: an inventory-grid icon representing a gameplay upgrade

subjects.name: Driftcore Nanocraft
subjects.description: A microscopic medical nanocraft, sleek bio-mechanical hull inspired by phage-capsid geometry, faceted carapace with bone-white plating and recessed crimson plasma vents, small cyan running lights along the spine, predatory streamlined silhouette like a mantis-shrimp, glowing reactor core visible through a central aperture, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Phage Sentry
subjects.description: A black icosahedral viral capsid hunter, sharp tail-fiber legs splayed outward like radial spokes, recessed lens-aperture in the center revealing a glowing crimson core, hard chitinous shell, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Lyssa Worm
subjects.description: A pale chitinous segmented organism, bone-yellow ribbed exoskeleton over wet red gut tissue, blunt ramming snout, side profile of a parasitic worm, glistening membrane between segments, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Lyssa Larva
subjects.description: A juvenile pale chitinous worm, bone-yellow ribs over translucent red interior, smaller and more agile than the adult, side profile, wet glistening segments, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Calcified Cyst (Mature)
subjects.description: A large lumpy mineralized cyst, brown ochre with deep fissures, brittle calcium-deposit outer shell, irregular drifting silhouette, organic-mineral hybrid, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Calcified Cyst (Juvenile)
subjects.description: A small lumpy mineralized cyst, brown ochre crust with cracks, brittle calcium-deposit shell, compact rounded silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Spore Burst
subjects.description: A tiny radial virion, magenta spherical body with cyan rigid spikes splayed in all directions, jagged star silhouette, neon bioluminescent glow, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Plaque Bead
subjects.description: A spherical brown-orange cellular clump, soft mottled membrane dotted with darker granules, soft round silhouette, gentle drifting biomass, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Ruptured Vesicle
subjects.description: A tan dome-shaped cell mid-rupture, leaking crimson plasma droplets dripping from below, frayed torn membrane edges, drippy round silhouette, wet glossy texture, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Plasmocyte Behemoth
subjects.description: A swollen oversized macrophage, bulbous orange-cyan blob with translucent membrane, internal organelles glowing through, slow lumbering silhouette, four times the size of a normal cell, wet glossy surface, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Ciliated Bacillus
subjects.description: An orange ovoid bacterium with segmented body, darker striations across the length, fine cilia hair-fringe along the lower edge, smooth elongated silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Macrophage MK-VII
subjects.description: A scarred white bio-mechanical hunter-cell, exposed crimson plasma vents, dripping cytoplasm seeping from joints, predatory side profile silhouette like a mantis-shrimp, segmented carapace, large mid-boss scale, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Plasmid Node
subjects.description: A round cyan-mint protocell with smooth translucent membrane, faint inner nucleus halo glow, suspended in violet bioluminescent aura, simple oval silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Paramecium Twin
subjects.description: A bilateral orange-pink ciliate cell, two small symmetrical bulges flanking a central nucleus, smooth oval body with cilia fringe, side profile, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Trilobe Polyp
subjects.description: A tri-lobed pink-orange cell, three petal-like lobes arranged around a glowing cyan nucleus, soft jelly silhouette, translucent membrane, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Cytotoxic Eye
subjects.description: A dark armored disc with a recessed crimson iris-aperture at center, segmented chitin housing around the rim, ringed pupil glowing from within, mid-boss scale, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Mitotic Hive
subjects.description: A black dome shell over molten orange tissue, finned chitinous base with rigid spines, wet inner mass spilling and glowing between the plates, mid-boss scale, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Scallop Driver
subjects.description: A vertical ribbed bivalve organism, bone-white grooved shell with parallel ridges, soft gradient interior visible at the seam, scallop silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Scallop Sprayer
subjects.description: A vertical ribbed bivalve organism with widened firing aperture, bone-white grooved shell, exposed orange spore sac visible at the opening, scallop silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Bristle Cell
subjects.description: A black radial sea-urchin microbe, rigid bristle tail-fibers fanning outward like spokes, glowing amber protein interior visible between the spines, hard chitinous body, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Plaque Bouncer
subjects.description: A round chunky orange-brown cellular mass, mottled membrane with darker granules, slightly more rigid than a soft cell, bouncing biomass silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Anchored Polyp
subjects.description: A sessile barnacle-cell glued to a substrate, bulbous orange-pink body with a single rigid firing tube extending forward, anchored base, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Cyan Plasma Droplet
subjects.description: A small pale cyan glowing plasma droplet, soft halo, simple teardrop bullet shape.

subjects.name: Bubble
subjects.description: A single translucent cyan soap-bubble, faint highlights catching the light, hollow round shape.

subjects.name: Beam Bolt
subjects.description: A short bright cyan-white energy beam segment, glowing white core with soft outer halo, narrow horizontal streak shape.

subjects.name: Acid Globule
subjects.description: A bright orange acidic droplet, wispy frayed edges, soft round blob shape.

subjects.name: Antibody Dart
subjects.description: A small Y-shaped dart with two short prongs at the front, glowing magenta plasma trail behind, sharp dart silhouette.

subjects.name: Pellet
subjects.description: A small banded teal-and-yellow round pellet, simple ball-bearing shape.

subjects.name: Pellet Mk-II
subjects.description: A round banded teal-yellow pellet with a darker rim and brighter inner core, slightly larger than the basic pellet.

subjects.name: Crystal Spike
subjects.description: A long crystalline shard, glowing white-violet, hexagonal cross-section, sharp pointed tip.

subjects.name: Acid Pellet
subjects.description: A small magenta acidic pellet, simple round droplet shape.

subjects.name: Saw Shard
subjects.description: A jagged saw-blade fragment, sawtooth silhouette, neon green glowing edges.

subjects.name: Plasma Bolt I
subjects.description: A short thin cyan plasma bolt, narrow elongated capsule shape, simple energy bullet.

subjects.name: Plasma Bolt II
subjects.description: A brighter cyan plasma bolt, narrow elongated capsule shape, slightly thicker glow than I.

subjects.name: Plasma Bolt III
subjects.description: A brilliant cyan plasma bolt with crisp edges, narrow elongated capsule shape, brightest of the series.

subjects.name: Spark Packet
subjects.description: A small electric-blue spark cluster, jittery sparkles around a glowing core, simple energy mote.

subjects.name: Mint Plasma Droplet
subjects.description: A small mint-green glowing plasma droplet, soft halo, simple teardrop bullet shape.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Basic
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone, simple symmetrical silhouette, bone-white plating with a glowing cyan reactor core visible through a central aperture, single forward firing aperture, miniature scale relative to the player ship, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Direct
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone with an oversized forward-facing precision beam emitter, sleek narrow predatory silhouette, bone-white plating with crimson plasma highlights, lens-aperture for the beam at the nose, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Homing
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone with an underside missile rack and small antenna sensors flanking the body, bone-white plating with crimson and cyan accents, slightly chunkier silhouette than basic, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Interceptor
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone with a focused crystal lens emitter at the front, sharp predatory silhouette, bone-white plating with cyan plasma glow surrounding the lens, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Bomber
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone with a bulged underside bay releasing a small magnetic mine droplet, bone-white plating with cyan vents along the side, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Rearguard
subjects.facing: Facing LEFT (firing rearward while drone hull faces right)
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone with a single rear-facing firing aperture mounted on the tail, bone-white plating with crimson plasma vents, asymmetric silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Apex
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone with a clearly upward-facing firing aperture mounted on the dorsal spine, bone-white plating with cyan vents, compact silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Nadir
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone with a clearly downward-facing firing aperture mounted on the ventral keel, bone-white plating with cyan vents, compact silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Up-Slope
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone with a forward-up firing aperture angled 45 degrees, bone-white plating with cyan vents, compact silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Option Mk-Down-Slope
subjects.description: A tiny medical-nanocraft helper drone with a forward-down firing aperture angled 45 degrees, bone-white plating with cyan vents, compact silhouette, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.

subjects.name: Bouncinator
subjects.description: An icon for a bullet-bounce upgrade. A glowing cyan plasma droplet ricochets between three concentric pulse rings, kinetic chevron motion lines tracing the bounce path, hard graphic icon silhouette, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Chain Bolt
subjects.description: An icon for a chain-lightning upgrade. A jagged white-cyan electrical fork branching outward from a central nucleus core, electric arcs leaping between three small enemy-cell silhouette nodes, sharp electric icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Critical Strike
subjects.description: An icon for a critical-hit upgrade. A precision crosshair reticle with a glowing crimson plasma droplet at the center, twin sharp diagonal slash marks crossing through, aggressive sniper icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Detonator
subjects.description: An icon for an enemy-explode-on-death upgrade. A cracked enemy cell silhouette mid-rupture, bright orange-crimson burst flaring radially outward, a few debris fragments suspended in mid-blast, explosive icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Drone Cannon
subjects.description: An icon for a drone-damage upgrade. A small medical-nanocraft drone silhouette with an oversized glowing cyan cannon barrel and a bright muzzle flash flare, mechanical drone icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Drone Reach
subjects.description: An icon for a drone-bullet-range upgrade. A small medical-nanocraft drone silhouette with a long extended firing line stretching far to the right toward a small distance arrow, range icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Drone Tempo
subjects.description: An icon for a drone-fire-rate upgrade. A small medical-nanocraft drone silhouette with three rapid pulse rings emanating outward from its barrel, motion-line speed marks, tempo icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Glass Cannon
subjects.description: An icon for a glass-cannon (more damage, less HP) upgrade. A cracked transparent crystal shell with a bright crimson plasma core glowing inside, sharp fissures running across the glass surface, fragile-power icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Greedy Streak
subjects.description: An icon for a coin-drop upgrade. A stack of three glowing gold coins with sparkle glints and a faint trail of additional coins arcing behind, wealth icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Last Hurrah
subjects.description: An icon for an enemy-fires-on-death upgrade. An enemy cell silhouette mid-death bursting eight radial bullet streaks outward in a star pattern, defiant final-shot icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Long Barrel
subjects.description: An icon for a bullet-range upgrade. An elongated glowing cyan barrel with a bright muzzle flash flare and a long horizontal range arrow indicator extending far to the right, range icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Magnetic Hull
subjects.description: An icon for a coin-pickup-radius upgrade. A cyan magnetic horseshoe radiating concentric attraction rings, two gold coins drifting toward the magnet center, magnet icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Quick Burner
subjects.description: An icon for a move-speed upgrade. A small streamlined medical nanocraft silhouette with three trailing motion lines and a bright crimson plasma flame trail, speed icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Phoenix Heart
subjects.description: An icon for a one-time-revive upgrade. A glowing crimson heart wreathed in orange plasma flame with a single feather rising above, revive icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Pierce on Death
subjects.description: An icon for a pierce-on-death upgrade. A bullet streak punching cleanly through three stacked enemy cell silhouettes, exit trail glowing cyan, pierce icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Bullet Speed
subjects.description: An icon for a bullet-speed-and-range upgrade. A glowing cyan plasma droplet trailing a long blurred speed-line streak with chevron motion marks, velocity icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Rapid Fire
subjects.description: An icon for a fire-rate upgrade. A muzzle flash burst with three rapid-fire bullet streaks fanning forward in tight succession, tempo icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Reloader
subjects.description: An icon for a reload-speed upgrade. A circular reload arrow wrapping around a glowing magazine cartridge, soft motion blur on the arrow tail, reload icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Sharpened Rounds
subjects.description: An icon for a bullet-damage upgrade. A serrated bullet-tip silhouette with razor-edged side fins and a glowing cyan plasma core, sharp aggressive icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Slow Cannon
subjects.description: An icon for a heavy-slow-bullet upgrade. A massive heavy bullet shell with weight-impact lines beneath it, slow-arc trail behind, oversized scale, heavy-impact icon, microscopic-medical-sci-fi palette.

subjects.name: Bomb
subjects.facing: Stationary mid-deployment, viewed from the side
subjects.description: A heavy spherical explosive ordnance, bone-white casing with crimson warning bands, exposed cyan plasma fuse on top, weighted base, deployable bomb side profile, fluorescence-microscopy aesthetic.
